notes: Code review of Issue #499 changes found no refactoring needed. All 7 items are cleanly implemented: (1) Constants (THINKING_POLLING_INTERVAL_MS, REDUCED_CAPTURE_LINES, FULL_CAPTURE_LINES, AUTO_STOP_ERROR_THRESHOLD) are properly centralized in auto-yes-config.ts with consistent UPPER_SNAKE_CASE naming. (2) The precomputedLines optimization in prompt-detector.ts follows the existing DetectPromptOptions pattern with proper optional chaining fallback. (3) Capture lines reduction (REDUCED_CAPTURE_LINES vs FULL_CAPTURE_LINES) is cleanly branched in pollAutoYes() based on stopPattern presence. (4) The consecutive_errors auto-stop is centralized in incrementErrorCount() (DR1-002) avoiding DRY violations. (5) AutoYesStopReason type is properly extended and flows from auto-yes-config.ts through auto-yes-state.ts to WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx. (6) Cache TTL extension (2000->3000ms) is a single constant change. (7) Locale files (ja/en) include the new consecutiveErrorsStopped key with appropriate translations. TypeScript compiles cleanly. 5011 unit tests pass (1 pre-existing failure in git-utils.test.ts unrelated to #499). No duplicated logic, no unnecessary changes, consistent naming conventions throughout.
